mapper.select: select user_id, product_id, view_time from cm_user_view_product where user_id = #{userId} and product_id = #{productId}
mapper.insert: insert into cm_user_view_product (user_id, product_id, view_time) values (#{record.userId}, #{record.productId}, #{record.viewTime})
mapper.update: update cm_user_view_product set view_time = #{record.viewTime} where user_id = #{record.userId} and product_id = #{record.productId}
